benchmark_id: grunfeld_panel_fmols_group_mean
dataset_file: grunfeld_panel_fmols.csv
panel_id: firm
time_id: year
dependent_variable: linv
regressors: lvalue, lcapital
panel_method: group_mean
trend: const
first_stage: level
kernel: bartlett
bandwidth_method: fixed
bandwidth_value: 6
notes: Recommended public benchmark spec for fmolsR versus EViews comparison.
